message:
native: matmul_int4_fp16_f16 + matmul_int4_f32_f32 byte-equal (9/15)

Naga (wgpu-native) rejects ptr<storage, ...> as a function argument,
which Tint (browser Dawn) accepts. Inlined load_byte / load_nibble
into every call site as direct array reads:
  nibble at index n: (arr[n >> 3] >> ((n & 7) * 4)) & 0xF
  byte at index   b: (arr[b >> 2] >> ((b & 3) * 8)) & 0xFF

Affected: embed_lookup_int4, matmul_int4_fp16_f16,
matmul_int4_f32_f32, qmoe_gate_up, qmoe_down_scatter. The int4
helpers file is no longer needed; deleted.

Also: device descriptor now installs an uncapturedError callback
that surfaces wgpu validation errors via libc fprintf instead of
Naga's default panic — much easier to diagnose shader compile
failures during the port.

Browser path verified still byte-equal — the inlined math is the
same, just avoids the helper function indirection.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+{
+  "shader": "matmul_int4_f32_f32",
+  "uniform": {
+    "binding": 0,
+    "byteLength": 16
+  },
+  "extraUniforms": [],
+  "inputs": [
+    {
+      "binding": 1,
+      "name": "x",
+      "byteLength": 2048
+    },
+    {
+      "binding": 2,
+      "name": "w_int4",
+      "byteLength": 4096
+    },
+    {
+      "binding": 3,
+      "name": "w_scales",
+      "byteLength": 512
+    },
+    {
+      "binding": 4,
+      "name": "w_zp",
+      "byteLength": 128
+    },
+    {
+      "binding": 5,
+      "name": "bias",
+      "byteLength": 128
+    }
+  ],
+  "output": {
+    "binding": 6,
+    "dtype": "f32",
+    "byteLength": 1024,
+    "hasInitial": false
+  },
+  "dispatch": [
+    1,
+    1,
+    1
+  ]
+}
\ No newline at end of file

@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+{
+  "shader": "matmul_int4_fp16_f16",
+  "uniform": {
+    "binding": 0,
+    "byteLength": 16
+  },
+  "extraUniforms": [],
+  "inputs": [
+    {
+      "binding": 1,
+      "name": "x",
+      "byteLength": 1024
+    },
+    {
+      "binding": 2,
+      "name": "w_int4",
+      "byteLength": 4096
+    },
+    {
+      "binding": 3,
+      "name": "w_scales",
+      "byteLength": 512
+    },
+    {
+      "binding": 4,
+      "name": "w_zp",
+      "byteLength": 128
+    },
+    {
+      "binding": 5,
+      "name": "bias",
+      "byteLength": 128
+    }
+  ],
+  "output": {
+    "binding": 6,
+    "dtype": "f16",
+    "byteLength": 512,
+    "hasInitial": false
+  },
+  "dispatch": [
+    1,
+    1,
+    1
+  ]
+}
\ No newline at end of file
